title: Nephrylis
description: A custom GUI resource pack featuring dark semitransparent UI with rounded corners, beautiful yet minimalistic enough buttons with violet accent
body:
This GUI resource pack was created by a graphic designer, featuring dark semitransparent UI with rounded corners, beautiful yet minimalistic enough buttons with violet accent. Supports AppleSkin mod.

Known issues:
- forgot to change accent color on the selected slot of active hotbar

Some unstyled UI elements are from Faithful x32 resource pack.
